name: Tie & Style E-commerce Website
description: This project focuses on building a modern fashion e-commerce website for Tie & Style, a brand specializing in premium men's accessories including ties, bow ties, pocket squares, and formal styling essentials. The platform features product catalogs, advanced filtering, secure checkout, user authentication, and an admin dashboard for inventory management. Designed with a sleek UI/UX, high performance optimization, and scalable backend architecture, the website enhances online shopping experience and brand identity.

name: Digital Store Web Application
description: This project focuses on building a scalable Digital Store Web Application that enables businesses and creators to sell digital products such as e-books, templates, software, courses, and downloadable assets. The platform includes secure file delivery, order management, payment integration, user authentication, and an admin dashboard for product control. Designed with a modern UI/UX, high performance architecture, and mobile-first optimization, the system ensures a seamless purchasing experience and strong digital brand presence.

name: Next X Startup Company Website
description: This project focuses on building the official website for Next X Startup Company, showcasing its vision, products, services, and innovation-driven solutions. The platform is designed with a modern UI/UX, high performance, and scalable architecture to represent a strong digital presence.

name: PhotoSelection Studio Website
description: This project focuses on building the official website for PhotoSelection Studio, a modern photography and image selection platform designed to streamline client photo selection and gallery management. The website showcases studio services, categorized portfolios, secure client galleries, and an intuitive photo selection system. Built with a clean UI/UX, high performance, and scalable architecture, the platform enhances both client experience and studio workflow efficiency.

name: Cuddles & Capture Photo Studio Website
description: This project focuses on building the official website for Cuddles & Capture Photo Studio, showcasing its photography services, creative portfolios, client galleries, and studio experience. The platform is designed with a modern UI/UX, fast performance, and scalable architecture to establish a strong and premium digital presence for the brand.

name: HealthUp Medical Website
description: HealthUp Medical is a modern healthcare website designed to provide seamless appointment booking, doctor discovery, health service information, and patient engagement. The platform features a clean medical UI design, secure contact forms, service management, and responsive performance optimized for all devices.

name: HealthUp Clinic Website
description: HealthUp Clinic Website is a professionally designed medical & clinic website built with a modern healthcare UI template. It features responsive layouts, service & department pages, doctor profiles, testimonials, appointment booking sections, and essential patient information designed to build trust and make health services easily accessible online. This project was developed to help clinics showcase departments, services, and specialists while offering a user-friendly experience for patients.

name: Free Invoice Web Application
description: This project focuses on building a Free Invoice Web Application designed for freelancers, small businesses, and startups to easily create, manage, and download professional invoices. The platform includes features like client management, automated invoice generation, tax calculation, PDF export, and payment tracking. Built with a clean and intuitive UI/UX, high performance architecture, and scalable backend system, the application simplifies billing workflows and improves financial organization.

name: Sweet Delights Cake Shop Website
description: This project focuses on building the official website for Sweet Delights Cake Shop, a premium bakery brand offering custom-designed cakes, celebration specials, and freshly baked desserts. The website highlights signature collections, themed cakes, online ordering, and a smooth customer journey. Designed with a modern UI/UX approach, fast-loading performance, and mobile-first optimization, the platform enhances brand visibility and maximizes customer engagement and conversions.

name: D & C Cakes Website
description: This project focuses on building the official website for D & C Cakes, a premium custom cake shop specializing in freshly baked, made-to-order celebration cakes. The platform showcases signature designs, live cake-in-60-minutes service, custom order system, and seamless user experience. Designed with modern UI/UX principles, high performance, and mobile-first optimization, the website strengthens the brand’s digital presence and improves customer conversions.

name: Podcast AI Model
description: This project allows anyone to generate, process, and publish podcasts automatically with the help of AI models (speech synthesis, transcription, and enhancement).

name: AI Weather Station MVP
description: A minimal AI-enhanced weather station built with Arduino UNO that collects temperature, humidity, and atmospheric pressure data, and provides a basic weather forecast using rule-based logic.

name: NarratoAI (Hearify)
description: NarratoAI converts any article, blog, or webpage into natural-sounding audio instantly. Paste a URL or upload text, choose your preferred voice, and listen anywhere. Perfect for commuting, studying, or multitasking, with downloadable MP3s and optional summarization for faster listening.

name: MyAgriBot
description: Your Farming Assistant in Your Pocket. MyAgriBot provides real-time agricultural information, weather forecasts, and market prices right in your Telegram app. Get instant access to farming knowledge whenever you need it!

name: LobeHub Icon Helper
description: Search, preview, and insert LobeHub icons directly in VS Code without leaving your editor (VS Code extension).

name: Fintracker
description: Track money. Achieve goals. Live better. A free, privacy-first finance tracker designed to turn your daily actions into progress. Set goals, budget with intent, and follow simple money laws that keep life on track.

name: CareerAI Website
description: Land Your Dream Job Faster with AI. Stop guessing what recruiters want. Our platform helps you build an ATS-friendly resume, write compelling cover letters, and optimize your LinkedIn profile in minutes.

name: WA Bulk Message Sender
description: Automate sending personalized WhatsApp messages to multiple contacts using Python + Selenium.

name: Img-Remover AI
description: Img-Remover AI uses the Python rembg library to remove backgrounds from images.

name: AquaAgri Ecosystem
description: Empowering communities with smart, sustainable agricultural solutions.

name: MadeToLead Website
description: Growing a business is like raising a child — it needs the right care, the right environment, and the right systems. At MadeToLead, we blend strategy, AI insights, and automation to fuel unstoppable growth (digital marketing company website).

name: Self-Organizing Maps Simulation
description: Self-Organizing Maps: Learn by Seeing. An intuitive, visual guide to how machines cluster and understand data.

name: Funny Development Portfolio
description: A funny and creative development portfolio website.

name: VoxCMD: Offline AI Voice Command
description: Take control of your system with voice commands that work completely offline. Enhanced security, powerful automation, zero data sharing.

name: Photography Portfolio Website
description: A stunning photography portfolio website showcasing the best works.
